title: Adventurer (disambiguation)
content:
'''Adventurer''' may refer to:
*'''[[Adventurer]]''', a [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] starship design.
*'''''[[Adventurer (Crescent-class)|Adventurer]]''''', the transport ship owned by [[Aelon Reglis]].
*'''[[Adventurer slugthrower rifle/Legends|Adventurer slugthrower rifle]]''', a [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka]] made rifle model.
*'''''[[The Adventurer]]''''', a [[LucasArts]] magazine about their products.

{{Disambig}}
